# Source Note: Google Ads Misrepresentation Policy

## Source

URL: https://support.google.com/adspolicy/answer/6020955?hl=en

Type: Primary/platform policy

## What it says

Ads/destinations must be clear, honest, and not misleading.

## Why it matters for autonomous marketing agents

This source informs what the agent can automate, how it should structure work, or what platform constraints it must account for.

## Agent instructions extracted

- Convert the source into actionable repo memory.
- Use it when selecting tactics, building campaign artifacts, or designing platform launch notes.
- Do not leave this source as a passive link; translate it into a tactic, platform rule, or experiment rule when relevant.
